summary: Iteration 4 testing completed successfully. All new features verified: Dashboard date filters with comparison mode, A/B template testing, contextual guide banners, lead status guide dialog, PWA manifest, and hidden Emergent badge. Backend 100% pass rate (13/13 tests), Frontend 100% functional.

issues: Chart rendering warnings - width/height (-1) should be greater than 0 (known cosmetic issue from iteration 1)

passed_tests: Admin login with admin@spectraflow.com / Admin123!
Dashboard date filter dropdown with options (Todo el tiempo, Hoy, Ultima semana, Ultimo mes, Ultimo trimestre, Ultimo ano)
Dashboard compare mode button appears when date filter is not 'all'
Dashboard KPI cards show delta percentages (+X% vs anterior) when compare mode is active
Dashboard chart shows both 'Actual' and 'Anterior' bars with legend when comparing
Dashboard stats API accepts from_date and to_date query params
Leads page: Guide banner shows 'Aprueba los mejores leads y envialos al CRM...'
Leads page: 'Estados' button opens Lead Status Guide dialog with all status explanations
ProspectFinder page: Guide banner shows 'Una vez que termines la busqueda, ve a Flow IA...'
Flow IA page: Guide banner shows 'Cuando los leads esten procesados y calificados...'
Templates page: A/B Test button opens A/B testing panel
Templates page: A/B test form has name input, template A/B selectors, create button
Templates page: A/B test results show winner and stats (sent, opens, clicks, replies)
POST /api/templates/ab-test creates A/B test successfully
GET /api/templates/ab-tests returns list of A/B tests
POST /api/templates/ab-tests/{id}/simulate returns simulated results with winner
PWA manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json with correct app name and icons
Excel export /api/export/leads works with auth token
Excel export /api/export/crm-contacts works with auth token
Excel export without auth returns 401 (security verified)
Emergent badge hidden via CSS (display: none !important)
Guide banners stored in localStorage and dismissible
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed templates for A/B testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 features all working: 1) Dashboard date filters (today/week/month/quarter/year) with comparison mode showing delta percentages and dual-bar charts, 2) A/B template testing with create/list/simulate endpoints (MOCKED simulation with random data), 3) Contextual guide banners on ProspectFinder, FlowIA, Leads, EmailMarketing pages stored in localStorage, 4) Lead status guide dialog explaining all lead lifecycle stages, 5) PWA manifest.json with icons, 6) Emergent badge hidden via CSS, 7) Excel export with proper blob type and auth.

dashboard_compare_mode.implementation: Shows delta percentages on KPIs and dual bars on chart

lead_status_guide.content: Full lead lifecycle from raw to closed_won/lost
